meaning: adj.胶粘的,感伤的n.胶粘物,蜜糖
examples: When the rice isn't cooked properly it goes lumpy and gooey.
If everyone were gooey and lovey-dovey, it would be an obnoxious world.
Specifically, squalene is the gooey oil squeezed from the liver of a shark.
Taking its cues from computer-aided-design software, an extruder stacks thin layers of gooey thermoplastic that cure into shape.
But are the pies going to taste better than the gooey concoctions McDonald's usually serves?
